title: Music World Arcano - ARCANE
description:
«Finjamos que es la primera vez»
Recreational magic, aesthetic and a bit of RPG mod.
body:
**Arcane Music World** It is magical and a mod with some RPG for Minecraft 1.20.1 that greatly improves the way you play and adds things to the Arcane world. It has a wide variety of items and mod compatibility: [Better Combat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-combat-by-daedelus), [Geckolib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib). giving it that happy feeling for those who were hoping for an Arcane mod in the block game.


```
 **HOW DOES IT WORK?**
``` 
You don't have to know much, add:
- PulsarZ
- Music records
- Bat Seconds 
- Hextech
- Chart
> ...and other features to be discovered or added in the future. 
Use the pulsarZ for long return trips and Hextech as a power source for the rest of the devices.
